title: Rich Smoky Middle Eastern Eggplant Baba Ganoush
description: A rich and smoky Middle Eastern dip featuring roasted eggplant, fish sauce, and shio cure, perfect for a diabetic-friendly snack or appetizer.
instructions: Preheat the oven to 400 degrees Fahrenheit.
Poke some holes in the eggplants and roast them in the oven for 45 minutes, or until the skin is charred and the flesh is tender.
Let the eggplants cool down, then peel and chop them into small pieces.
In a blender or food processor, combine the roasted eggplant, fish sauce, shio cure, lemon juice, garlic, olive oil, tahini, salt, and black pepper.
Blend the mixture until it is smooth and creamy.
Taste and adjust the seasoning as needed.
Transfer the baba ganoush to a serving bowl and garnish with parsley or other herbs.
Serve the baba ganoush with pita bread or vegetables.
